item.title: Stress Test - Version Scope Rule in Data Science ML
item.description: Stress Test: Version Scope Rule in Data Science / Machine Learning Seed Rule Being Tested Rule: For knowledge that applies only to specific software versions, tool releases, or library iterations, include explicit version scope in frontmatter.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: Anti-Patterns in Knowledge Management
item.description: Anti-Patterns in Knowledge Management Common mistakes that undermine a second brain’s effectiveness.

item.title: Atomic Note Principle
item.description: Atomic Note Principle A note must be atomic — it contains exactly one single idea.

item.title: Confidence Markers
item.description: Confidence Markers Signal the reliability of knowledge in your vault through structured confidence levels. The Problem Not all knowledge is equal.

item.title: Exportable Rules
item.description: Exportable Rules Purpose: Drop these rules into any AI agent context file (e.g., CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) to bootstrap a high-quality, AI-maintained knowledge graph on any topic.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI-Generated Content Verification
item.description: Frontier Exploration: AI-Generated Content Verification The Gap The Seed covers: Source citation requirements Confidence markers Procedural knowledge verification AI-optimized knowledge structures But there’s no explicit guidance on: How to verify that content generated by AI assistants is accurate ...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - AI-Optimized Knowledge Bases
item.description: Frontier Exploration: AI-Optimized Knowledge Bases How should knowledge bases be structured when the primary consumer is an AI agent rather than a human? The Problem Space The current Seed assumes human readers who can: Follow natural language explanations Ask clarifying questions when confused Infe...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Capturing AI Prompt Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Capturing AI Prompt Knowledge How should a knowledge base structure knowledge about interacting with AI systems through prompts? The Problem Prompt engineering is a form of procedural knowledge, but it has unique characteristics that existing Seed rules don’t fully address: Exa...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Comparative Knowledge Structures
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Comparative Knowledge Structures How should a knowledge base structure notes that compare approaches, tools, or methods? The Problem Knowledge bases often need to compare alternatives: “X vs Y” — which is better? Tool comparisons — “A vs B vs C” Method comparisons — “Approach 1...
